hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','')); allowed=lambda ch: ((ch.isascii() and (ch.isalnum() or ch in '/_.-')) or 0x3000 <= ord(ch) <= 0x303F or 0x3040 <= ord(ch) <= 0x30FF or 0x3400 <= ord(ch) <= 0x4DBF or 0x4E00 <= ord(ch) <= 0x9FFF or 0xF900 <= ord(ch) <= 0xFAFF or 0xFF01 <= ord(ch) <= 0xFF60 or 0xFFE0 <= ord(ch) <= 0xFFEE); ok=bool(p) and all(allowed(ch) for ch in p); p and not ok and print('[helix-hook] WARN: unsupported file_path skipped', file=sys.stderr); print(p if ok else '')" | { read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; ~/ai-dev-kit-vscode/cli/helix-hook "$f"; }
